title: Implement resolveGunFromSnapshot utility method (gunInstanceUuid -> shooter -> inventory search)

reference_files.reason: resolveGunFromSnapshot algorithm - 3-step backtracking (gunInstanceUuid -> shooter -> inventory search), null cases, known limitations
BulletSnapshot - getShooter(), getGunInstanceUuid() methods for backtracking

acceptance_criteria: Step 1: reads snapshot.getGunInstanceUuid(), returns null if null (independent fire like turret/trap)
Step 2: reads snapshot.getShooter() (player UUID), returns null if null or player offline/not found
Step 3: iterates player inventory searching for gun item with GunData.gunInstanceUuid matching snapshot UUID, returns ItemStack if found
Returns null if gun not in player inventory (dropped, stored in chest, cross-dimension)
Method is static and thread-safe (pure read operation, no side effects)
Method handles all edge cases gracefully (null checks at each step, no exceptions)
